name: Love Beyond Frontier
original_name: อุบัติรักข้ามขอบฟ้า
overview: Wang travels to Thailand searching for his mother and, after a series of mix-ups, ends up living with Pat while crossing paths with childhood friends Ple and Win, sparking complicated feelings and unexpected connections among the four.

trailers.title: อุบัติรักข้ามขอบฟ้า Love Beyond Frontier [Official Trailer]
